title: Food Product Machinery Market Trends, Opportunities and Strategies 2023-2024, 2024-2028, 2033F
author: Na
description: The global food product machinery market is expected to grow from $39 billion in 2023 to $70.3 billion in 2033, driven by increasing urbanization, e-commerce expansion, and growing demand for processed and packaged foods. The market is fragmented, with Marel, JBT Corporation, and Heat and Control Inc. being the top competitors.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: Marel is the largest competitor in the food product machinery market, with a 4.09% market share in 2023.
